Video.summary: Today we meet Mish who is on the lookout for her forever home. She is looking for a home perfect for entertaining. But will Viviana be able to find her a place that fits her style?
Video.title: Saratoga

Video.summary: We meet Debbie and Bob who are making the big change from NYC to LA. Will they find that perfect Hollywood Hills home?
Video.title: NYC to LA

Video.summary: Gea and David are looking for more space. They’re visiting some of the most desirable properties in Cupertino, California. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: Looking to Expand

Video.summary: Steve and Yazmin are retired Los Angelenos looking for a luxury property further south in Orange County. They’re about to see three properties in Yorba Linda, Villa Park and Santa Ana.
Video.title: Orange County Adventure

Video.summary: Today we meet Gil and Emma. They are looking for a home in the center of it all. Viviana takes them through three modern showstoppers in West Hollywood, California.
Video.title: Gil and Emma

Video.summary: Today we meet Cory; he is looking to surprise his wife with their dream home and they need enough room to grow their family.
Video.title: Cory

Video.summary: Glen and Giovanna return to Calabasas, determined to secure their ideal home in an enclave of luxury and privacy. Will they finally find their home in Calabasas?
Video.title: Calabasas Revisited

Video.summary: Alex and Luba explore prestigious Bel Air, California, in pursuit of a lavish million-dollar residence. Will they find their dream home in Beverly Hills?
Video.title: Beverly Hills Luxury

Video.summary: Savanah is looking for a home in Park City, Utah to escape from her LA lifestyle. As a filmmaker, she’s looking for a home that’ll inspire her creativity, as well as accommodate industry events during local film festivals.
Video.title: Park City Utah

Video.summary: Today we meet Christine and Kirk. Viviana takes them through three Modern Showstoppers on the west side of Los Angeles, California. They need a home with enough room for them and their dogs.
Video.title: Christine and Kirk

Video.summary: We meet million-dollar house hunters Erika & Sonny. They just moved from Chicago and are looking for the perfect Orange County home for their family. Will these Chicago transplants find the perfect West Coast home?
Video.title: Orange County Luxury

Video.summary: We meet Michael and Kelly who are in search for a luxury home. Viviana is taking them through some the most beautiful mega mansions in Montecito and Santa Barbara, California.
Video.title: Santa Barbara

Video.summary: Darren and Meg are relocating from the East Coast. They’re looking for better weather year round. They’re visiting some of the most desirable properties in Pasadena, California. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: From the East Coast to Pasadena

Image.alt: From the East Coast to Pasadena
From the East Coast to Pasadena
From the East Coast to Pasadena

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Kyle and Jess tour three luxury properties in Orange County, CA.
Video.title: Loving Laguna

Video.summary: Today is all about Candice, who is looking for the perfect home for her and her new husband in Los Gatos, California. Candice is looking to build a family in her forever home. Will she find what she is looking for?
Video.title: Candice

Video.summary: Doug and Nicole are searching for a new luxury home in Los Angeles, California. They need a house that’s closer to their clients. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: Luxury Home Search in Los Angeles

Image.alt: Luxury Home Search in Los Angeles
Luxury Home Search in Los Angeles
Luxury Home Search in Los Angeles

Video.summary: Pamela and William delve into the charming community of Sherman Oaks, aiming to find a character-filled home that captures their hearts.
Video.title: Sherman Oaks Charmer

Video.summary: Today, meet Fleet Easton, he is the Crown Prince of Palm Springs. He’s a singer & dancer who has worked hard and is now ready to buy his dream home. Watch the process and see which one of these desert dwellings will seal the deal.
Video.title: Desert Luxury

Video.summary: Mandy and Kevin are looking for their dream home by the water. Viviana is taking them through some of the most beautiful properties in Manhattan Beach. Will they find the perfect beach home that suits their needs?
Video.title: Mandy and Kevin

Video.summary: Follow Steve and Linda as they escape the cold of the East Coast and hunt for their sunny hideaway in Los Angeles. Will they find their winter escape?
Video.title: Winter Hideaway

Video.summary: Michael and Lynne are looking for a new home for when they get married. They’re visiting some of the most desirable properties in Pacific Palisades, California. Will they find their dream home?
Video.title: The Newlyweds

Video.summary: We meet John and Laura, a couple who are in search of a luxury home. Viviana takes them through some of the most beautiful mega mansions in Montecito, California.
Video.title: Montecito

Video.summary: We meet husband and wife duo, Leanne & Michael. They are looking for a coastal home in Orange County, California now that their children have grown. Which one of these seaside sanctuaries will be the one?
Video.title: A House by the Sea

Video.summary: Will Sydney and Ralph find enough room for them and their fur baby? Only the hills of Pasadena have the answer.
Video.title: Pasadena Peaches

Video.summary: Viviana will help Win find his ultimate dream home. We travel around Santa Barbara in search of a tranquil home in the middle of nature. He needs a peaceful house where he can host his family.
Video.title: Santa Barbara

Video.summary: We meet Bobbi Jo & Carmen. They are looking for a million-dollar home to be closer to work and upgrade to the home of their dreams. Which one of these million-dollar homes will be the one?
Video.title: Hollywood Hills

Video.summary: Steve and Natalie are east-coast transplants looking for the quintessential California lifestyle. We’re about to see three amazing properties in Manhattan Beach and Redondo Beach.
Video.title: Quintessential California Life

Video.summary: Gordanna and Ginna are moving from overseas to the sunny shores of Venice, California. Will they find all that glitters with gold?
Video.title: New Roots

Video.summary: Lisa and her best friend Maria are on the journey to find Lisa’s next home. Will they find the one her family will flock to?
Video.title: Empty Nesting

Video.summary: Today, we meet million dollar house hunters Patrick and Pol. Stay tuned! They have three luxury properties to check out on this Million Dollar Malibu House Hunt. From modern to traditional, will these homes tick the right boxes?
Video.title: Malibu Magic

Video.summary: We meet Mark and Laura who are in search of a luxury home. They need a house with the perfect kitchen and entertaining space. They will tour three homes in Los Gatos, California.
Video.title: Los Gatos

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Peter and Nathalie tour three luxury properties in Venice, CA.
Video.title: Venturing to Venice

Video.summary: We meet Ziba, a stay-at-home enterpriser. She is looking for the perfect home for her and her husband. They see a beautiful modern home in Luxury Bel Air with stunning views and all the bells and whistles.
Video.title: Bel Air Sophistication

Video.summary: Million dollar house hunter Veletta is looking to trade in East Coast living for the warmth of Southern California. She’s about to see three luxurious properties in Calabasas, CA.
Video.title: Calabasas Dreaming

Video.summary: Tania is looking for a larger home for her and her boyfriend. She will tour three stunning homes in Cupertino, California. Will Viviana be able to help Tania find the perfect home?
Video.title: Tania

Video.summary: Today we meet Clair and Monte. They are looking for an entertainer's home by the beach. Viviana takes them through three amazing properties in Manhattan Beach. Will Viviana help them find what they are looking for?
Video.title: Clair and Monte

Video.summary: We meet Alex who is on the lookout for his forever home. Viviana is taking him through some of the most beautiful properties in Santa Barbara, California.
Video.title: Santa Barbara

Video.summary: Best Friends, Siri And Marie tour three luxury properties in Pacific Palisades, CA.
Video.title: Californian Dreaming

Video.summary: Luxury Home Buyers Lizzie and Martin tour three luxury properties in Manhattan and Redondo Beach.
Video.title: Beach House Hunt

Video.summary: Today we follow James and Tricia as they house hunt around Encino, CA. Will they find their forever home? Let’s see if Viviana can help them find the perfect home.
Video.title: Hidden Hills

Video.summary: Armen and Jean are looking for a home close to the beach and closer to work. Viviana takes them through some of the most beautiful properties Manhattan Beach has to offer.
Video.title: Armen and Jean

Video.summary: Sonia and Brooklyn's pursuit leads them to Laguna Beach, seeking a million-dollar oceanfront haven with panoramic vistas of the sparkling waters.
Video.title: Beachside Bliss in Laguna
